title: The most viewed document in the FBI Vault!
summary: Brief discussion of the Guy Hottel memo, a 1950 FBI document describing alleged UFO crash retrievals in New Mexico, which has become the most viewed document on the FBI's public vault website.

acronyms.definition: US federal law enforcement and intelligence agency
Unidentified aerial phenomena, commonly associated with alleged extraterrestrial craft
Law allowing public access to government documents through declassification requests

events.description: Guy Hottel memo written describing alleged recovery of three flying saucers in New Mexico

key_claims.claim: The Guy Hottel memo is the most read/searched document on the FBI's website
The memo states that three flying saucers were recovered in New Mexico
The recovered craft were described as circular, approximately 50 feet in diameter with raised centers
Each craft contained three bodies of human shape, only 3 feet tall, dressed in metallic cloth of fine texture
Guy Hottel was head of the FBI's Washington field office when the memo was written
